google_play.title: TowerMaze: Climb & Escape Lava
google_play.short_description: Climb the rotating lava tower! Dodge traps, navigate mazes & escape the heat.
google_play.full_description:
🔥 Can you escape the rising lava?

TowerMaze is a thrilling climbing game where you navigate a rotating maze tower while lava rises beneath you. One wrong turn and you're toast!

🏔️ CLIMB THE TOWER
Race upward through a procedurally generated maze tower that gets harder the higher you climb. Every run is different — no two towers are the same.

🌀 ROTATING MAZE CHALLENGE
The tower rotates as you climb, turning simple paths into brain-twisting puzzles. Find the right path before the lava catches up!

🎯 EASY TO PLAY, HARD TO MASTER
Simple swipe controls, but the maze gets trickier with dead ends, branching paths, and surprise lava rushes. How high can you go?

🎨 UNLOCK EPIC BALL SKINS
Collect Ember coins and unlock unique ball skins — from Molten Core to Neon Pro to Golden Glory. Each with custom effects and trails.

🏆 FEATURES
• Endless procedural tower — never the same run twice
• Rotating maze mechanics with increasing difficulty
• 13+ unique ball skins with custom VFX
• Tower skins to change the environment
• Daily missions and streak rewards
• Checkpoint system for epic comebacks
• Offline play — no wifi needed
• Challenge yourself to climb higher every run

Download TowerMaze now and see how high you can climb! 🔥

app_store.title: TowerMaze: Climb & Escape
app_store.subtitle: Lava Tower Ball Climbing Game
app_store.promotional_text: New skins and daily missions added! How high can you climb?
